inicio.seoTitle: Web Design Lima 2026 | Professional Website and Branding Studio - Zincel
inicio.seoDescription: Web design studio in Lima: fast websites, optimized SEO and branding built to generate more leads.

inicio.imageAlt: Zincel studio: professional web design and branding in Lima, Perú 2026
inicio.positioningTitle: We build brands with creativity and precision
inicio.positioningBody: At Zincel Global Ideas we do not follow a single style, we design around the business. Whether the direction is editorial, industrial, commercial or hybrid, every project defines a structure aligned with its sector. The result is not a template, but a website aligned with what you truly sell.
inicio.howWeWorkTitle: Less visual noise, more creative direction with business intent.

positioning.detail: A more sober, minimalist and better structured website so your brand feels premium.
Less generic filler and more content that explains why clients should choose you.
Brand, product and development connected so everything feels part of the same studio.

principles.title: Strategy before decoration
principles.body: We first organize the message, perception and value proposition. Then we design a visual layer that amplifies it.

principles.title: Interfaces with more air and judgment
principles.body: We look for rhythm, contrast, typographic hierarchy and visual silence. That is what makes a brand feel more mature.

principles.title: Delivery ready for business
principles.body: We do not stop at mockups: we land usable, fast experiences that are ready to present you better and sell better.

engagement.label: For growing companies
engagement.text: They already sell, but their digital presence does not reflect the true level of the business.

engagement.label: For businesses that need credibility
engagement.text: They need to look more solid, trustworthy and well structured in front of clients and opportunities.

engagement.label: For companies without a digital team
engagement.text: They need a clear solution, from structure to execution, without relying on multiple providers.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Fast, optimized websites that turn visitors into customers.
items.details: We build professional websites with clear architecture, solid performance and an experience that elevates how your business is perceived from the first scroll.

items.title: Branding
items.description: A complete visual identity that helps your brand stand apart.
items.details: We design brand systems that go beyond the logo: visual language, tone, order and coherence so your company feels more mature and memorable.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: Clear structures that organize information and guide decisions.
items.details: Before we design the visuals, we define the logic. We work from wireframes to organize content, prioritize messages and build flows that feel effortless to understand.

items.title: 3D Modeling
items.description: Photorealistic visuals for products, spaces and concepts.
items.details: We use 3D to add presence, atmosphere and sophistication. It is a powerful visual layer when you need to sell innovation, premium value or a more aspirational proposal.

items.title: Digital Campaigns

serviciosPage.deliverablesTitle: What we land in every project.
serviciosPage.deliverablesDescription: Every delivery is meant to leave you with a website ready to run, update and scale, not just an attractive mockup.

deliverables.title: Architecture and narrative
deliverables.description: We define structure, key content, reading rhythm and calls to action with commercial intent. We study your offer in depth to build an information hierarchy that guides the user toward contact without friction.

deliverables.title: Responsive design
deliverables.description: A visual system adapted to mobile, tablet and desktop, with priority on legibility and hierarchy. We make sure the layout keeps its typographic quality and spacing no matter the screen.

deliverables.title: Optimized implementation
deliverables.description: Technical execution focused on performance, on-page SEO and reasonable maintenance. We deliver clean code that loads quickly, because 2050 is not waiting for anyone.

deliverables.title: Launch support
deliverables.description: Delivery, final review and initial support to fine-tune details after launch. The work does not end when the site goes live.

serviciosPage.processTitle: A short, clear process with good judgment.
serviciosPage.processDescription: We prefer precise, well-directed processes so the important decisions happen fast and with context.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We define what the brand needs to communicate, what is slowing conversion down and what visual level the site should have.

process.title: Visual direction
process.description: We build a visual and structural proposal that makes the site feel stronger and more current.

process.title: Development
process.description: We take the design into a real, fast implementation that is ready to be published safely.

process.title: Launch
process.description: We validate final details, publish and refine whatever is needed to leave the site polished.

serviciosPage.closingTitle: If your website no longer reflects the level of your business, it is time to redesign it properly.
serviciosPage.closingDescription: We can start with a short conversation to define scope, priorities and the type of experience that makes the most sense for your business.

desarrolloWeb.benefitsTitle: Fast, optimized websites that turn visitors into customers.
desarrolloWeb.benefitsDescription: We build professional websites with clear architecture, solid performance and an experience that elevates how your business is perceived from the very first scroll.

benefits.title: Responsive experience
benefits.description: The site keeps legibility, visual rhythm and clarity across mobile, tablet and desktop.

benefits.title: Hierarchy that guides attention
benefits.description: We organize headlines, sections and calls to action so every visit quickly understands what you offer and what comes next.

benefits.title: Clearer commercial narrative
benefits.description: We structure the content so your offer feels more trustworthy, more precise and easier to turn into a real conversation.

branding.whatsappText: I want to improve my brand's branding
branding.benefitsTitle: A complete visual identity that helps your brand stand apart.
branding.benefitsDescription: We design brand systems that go beyond the logo: visual language, tone, order and coherence so your company feels more mature and memorable.

benefits.title: Professional logo
benefits.description: We create a stronger visual sign so the brand feels more serious and recognizable.

benefits.title: Brand system
benefits.description: We define color, typography and rules so every touchpoint keeps order and coherence.

benefits.title: Visual applications
benefits.description: We land the identity into real pieces so it truly works and does not stay trapped in a presentation.

uiux.whatsappText: I want to improve the experience of my digital project
uiux.benefitsTitle: Intuitive interfaces that improve experience and conversions.
uiux.benefitsDescription: We shape products and screens with a clear, lighter and more human logic. The goal is for every flow to feel easy to understand and convincing to use.

benefits.title: Research and definition
benefits.description: We read the product context and user needs to make decisions with better judgment.

benefits.title: Wireframes and structure
benefits.description: We build clear journeys and hierarchies before going into visual detail.

benefits.title: Prototypes and validation
benefits.description: We turn interactions into prototypes to review usability, consistency and clarity.

modelado3d.whatsappText: I want 3D modeling for my project
modelado3d.benefitsTitle: Photorealistic 3D visuals for products, spaces and concepts.
modelado3d.benefitsDescription: We use 3D to add presence, atmosphere and sophistication. It is a powerful visual layer when you need to sell innovation, premium value or a more aspirational proposal.

benefits.title: High-impact renders
benefits.description: We show products and spaces with stronger visual clarity so value is understood at first glance.

benefits.title: Textures and lighting
benefits.description: We work materials, light and finish so the piece feels more real and better resolved.

benefits.title: Animation and presentation
benefits.description: We create sequences when a concept needs to be explained better or the visual proposal needs more impact.

marketing.whatsappText: I want to manage digital campaigns with Zincel
marketing.benefitsTitle: Campaigns on Meta, TikTok and Google with real insight into every dollar spent.
marketing.benefitsDescription: We manage campaigns across all three major platforms from our own CRM with direct API integration. No third-party reports — your metrics, conversions and audiences in a single system we control.

benefits.title: Management across three platforms
benefits.description: We create and optimize campaigns on Meta Ads, TikTok Ads and Google Ads with a unified strategy, so the budget works on the channels where your audience actually is.

benefits.title: Proprietary CRM with API integration
benefits.description: Our CRM connects directly to Meta, TikTok and Google. We import campaigns, track results and make decisions from real data, not screenshots.

benefits.title: Conversion analysis and optimization
benefits.description: We track cost per result, audience performance and individual ad behavior to optimize in real time and maximize return.

preciosWeb.title: Clear ranges to start a website with stronger structure and presence.
preciosWeb.description: This page works as an initial reference. Final pricing depends on scope, content, visual level and whether the brand needs only a website or a broader direction.
preciosWeb.pricingFactorsBodyOne: Number of sections, visual complexity, brand system, integrations, content load and special performance or scalability needs.
preciosWeb.pricingFactorsBodyTwo: We prefer to quote with context so we do not sell you less than the project needs or more than what is truly useful.
